description: FraudLabs Pro provides fraud screening for online orders and user transactions, plus SMS OTP verification services. Businesses use it to score transactions, retrieve results, submit feedback, and send or verify one-time passwords.
summary: FraudLabs Pro exposes two authenticated REST APIs on `https://api.fraudlabspro.com`: a fraud-detection API and an SMS-verification API, both using a FraudLabs Pro API key passed as the `key` query parameter.
